intentSynonyms: edit an existing message in slack
description: Edit an existing Slack message. The caller must be the original author of the message.

channel.description: Channel ID where the message is located (e.g., C01234567)

ts.description: Timestamp of the message to edit — serves as the unique message ID (e.g., 1234567890.123456)

text.description: New message text — replaces the entire message content. Supports Slack mrkdwn formatting.
